SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?player(COUNT(DISTINCT ?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q973810 ; wdt:P2245 wd:Q1967541 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1370 ?winnerTeam .
  ?winnerTeam wdt:P527 ?player .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?date) , 1 , 4) = "2013")
  VALUES ?player {
    wd:Q175307 wd:Q197475 wd:Q290885 wd:Q270165 wd:Q286059 wd:Q517090
  }
}
GROUP BY ?player
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
```
